title: World Downloader²
description: A simple Tool to download Worlds from Servers & Singleplayer
body:
# **World Downloader**
Download and save any Minecraft world you visit — whether singleplayer or multiplayer — with a single keypress. **_Quick Tutorial in Galerie on how to use it._**
## Features:
###  **World Export**
Press J at any time to export the world around you. Every chunk you've loaded gets saved to a fully playable world in your downloaded_worlds folder.
###  Container Support
Chest contents, inventories and block entity components are correctly saved and preserved in the exported world.
###  **Texture Pack Export**
Resource packs are automatically included with the exported world so it looks exactly as you experienced it.
###  **Downloaded Worlds Browser**
A dedicated "Downloaded Worlds" button in the world selection screen lets you browse and open all your exports separately from your normal saves.
###  Mod Menu Integration
Configure the mod to your liking directly from the Mod Menu screen.
Notes:
- Currently supports Minecraft 1.21.1
- Client-side only — works on any server
- Exported worlds open in Creative mode with cheats enabled so you can freely explore
### Required Mods:
- Fabric Api
- ModMenu(optional)

##  Please report any bug on github, or join my discord!
